caption: A person wearing dark grey trousers and black shoes is moving large, bright yellow equipment cases in a room with a brick wall and wooden floor. The cases are silver-trimmed, feature latches, and have the letter "E" printed on their sides. In the sequence, the individual is positioned behind a yellow case resting on a wheeled dolly. They reach out to grasp the handle of a second yellow case that is being lowered or slid into place atop the first one. As the action progresses, the person shifts their weight and adjusts their stance to stabilize the equipment. The second case descends steadily until it sits flush on top of the bottom case. The focus remains on the lower half of the person's body and the mechanical interaction between the two yellow containers and the dolly.
